---
title: "8 Implementation & Execution (The Launch)"
---

There will be subsections for the following topics

## 8.1 Simulation Prerequisites

-   i.e. RHESSys environment already set up (i.e. Docker image, compiled version of RHESSys, SIF file)
-   Worldfile
-   Flowtable
-   Formatted climate files
-   Set of definition files corresponding to the project

## 8.2 The RHESSysIOinR environment
-   Package overview
-   Bridge between RHESSys code and R environment

## 8.3 Script configuration

-   Rmd script
-   input mapping
-   temporal parameters (setting start/end dates)

## 8.4 Data output filtering

-   Building filter
-   Combine multiple filters into single R object

## 8.5 Running the model
-   Single run
-   Multiple runs

## 8.6 Example Dataset
-   Files to refer to

#
